title: VAT Accounting Software

description: Full-featured accounting platform with general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, bank reconciliation, and financial statement generation.

title: Attendance Management System
description: Automated attendance tracking with biometric integration, shift management, leave tracking, and real-time reporting for organisations of any size.

title: Human Resource Management System
description: Comprehensive HRMS covering employee records, recruitment, performance appraisal, training management, and organisational hierarchy.

description: Lightweight office management tool for small businesses covering tasks, attendance, invoicing, and basic HR — simple, fast, and affordable.

description: Clinic and diagnostic centre management covering patient registration, test orders, result reporting, billing, and doctor schedules.

description: Cloud-based billing and invoicing system with recurring billing, tax management, payment reminders, and client portal.

description: Campus management system covering admissions, student records, timetable, exams, results, fees, library, and parent portal.

description: All-in-one shop management system for sales, purchases, inventory, accounts, and daily reporting for retail outlets.

description: Property management system for tracking assets, rental agreements, maintenance schedules, tenant records, and financial reports.

title: Multi-Purpose Management Software
description: Flexible multi-module management platform adaptable for various business types including trading, services, and manufacturing.

description: Apartment project tracking system with progress monitoring, contractor management, budget control, and handover management.

title: Customer Relationship Management System

title: Department of Fisheries MIS Database
